Per-task permissions for the current user, keyed by task id. Each entry carries a Fenergo.Nebula.Journey.Query.Application.Dto.PermissionDto per action (e.g. `canReopen`) with a `permitted` flag and a human-readable `reason` tooltip. Only emitted when at least one task has a denied permission; otherwise omitted.

Channel type describing whether journeys will be initiated by internal teams (Internal) or external customers through Portal (External)
  • Internal journeys are ones that are initiated and processed by internal teams, e.g., RMs, KYC Analysts, Compliance.
  • External journeys are ones that are initiated and processed by the end customer via the portal.
  • This let's the portal quickly know which journey to pick up and which to ignore.
Might be null for older journey instances that were created before this property was introduced

Channel type describing whether journeys will be initiated by internal teams (Internal) or external customers through Portal (External)
  • Internal journeys are ones that are initiated and processed by internal teams, e.g., RMs, KYC Analysts, Compliance.
  • External journeys are ones that are initiated and processed by the end customer via the portal.
  • This let's the portal quickly know which journey to pick up and which to ignore.
